MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CENTRAL MORTGAGE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: John Ward of Malcolm Cisneros (949.252.9400) appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party; Andrew Dimitriou of Dimitriou & Associates (434.1144) for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's demurrer to the 2nd cause of action is sustained with leave to amend.
Demurrer to the 8th cause of action is sustained without leave to amend.
Demurrer to the 1st, 3rd, 4th-7th causes of action are overruled.
Plaintiff must file its second amended complaint within 10 days of notice of entry of the order. Mr. Ward to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
